Kukuwano Company Limited

Building Resilient Business Across South Sudan & East Africa

About Us Our Services The CEO Message Leadership Company Profile Contact

About Us

Kukuwano Company Limited (KCL) is headquartered in Kajo-Keji County, Central Equatoria State, with operations in Juba. We are committed to building a trusted, resilient brand that drives growth and innovation across South Sudan and East Africa.

Our Services

  • General Trading | Reliable sourcing and distribution of goods
  • Construction | Quality infrastructure and project delivery
  • Investor Relations & Stakeholder Management
  • Supply | Food and non-food items for diverse needs
  • Pharmacy | Trusted healthcare and pharmaceutical solutions
  • Regional Trade & Partnership Development

The CEO Message

“At Kukuwano, we believe in resilience, professionalism, and regional pride. Our mission is to create sustainable opportunities, foster investor confidence, and position South Sudan as a hub for business excellence.”

The CEO / Ustaz Charles Jame Samuel Buranga

The CEO: Ustaz Charles Jame Samuel Buranga

Leadership

Our leadership team combines expertise in law, diplomacy, and business management to ensure Kukuwano’s growth is strategic, transparent, and impactful.

Company Profile

Mission To empower communities and stakeholders by delivering reliable services, fostering economic growth, and positioning South Sudan as a hub for business excellence in East Africa Our company is fully registered and compliant with all regulatory requirements. To become a leading African company recognized for credibility, professionalism, and transformative impact across industries To provide quality services that exceed customer expectations. .
